scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => fs.existsSync(f) && fs.unlinkSync(f)); if (process.env.npm_config_user_agent && !process.env.npm_config_user_agent.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:vercel: pnpm --filter @workspace/BetterCapitalInvestment run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('artifacts/bettercapitalinvestment/dist/public','public',{recursive:true})"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
